markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce the new engagement manager and align on content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New POC:** Matt is the new GrowthX engagement manager, splitting roles with content producer Khalil to improve focus.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** Content must pivot from "closed loop only" to a broader "open loop" narrative (define, explore, augment, automate) to avoid alienating prospects and align with a future product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [**Content Refresh:** Prioritize refreshing 2–3 "closed loop" articles per vertical (Refining, Petrochem, LNG) to support new campaigns launching in \~2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [**Housekeeping:** Imubit IT is fixing the Slack channel access issue; GrowthX will add banners to refreshed articles to promote new guides.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Team Restructure

  - [Matt is the new engagement manager, replacing Mariana.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The role split (client-facing vs. content production) improves focus.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
      - [**Matt:** Client communication, reporting, strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
      - [**Khalil:** Dedicated content production.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Mariana will co-pilot the transition to ensure a smooth handover.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

### Slack Channel Access

  - [**Issue:** The shared Imubit/Team 201 channel was decommissioned by Imubit IT without notice.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Imubit IT is creating a new, dedicated channel and will invite the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

### Performance & Content Pipeline

  - [**Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [Clicks: +7% WoW.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
      - [AI Competitive Presence: 16% (up from 12–13%).](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**New Competitors Identified:** Falconry, Uptick.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**Current Pipeline (7 articles):**](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [Gene Mining, Bed Cycle Time, Griding Technology, Cement AI Technology, Smarter Setpoint Controls, Thermal Fatigue, Continuous Process Control.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Add "AI" to titles (e.g., "Cement AI Technology") to capture high-intent search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

### Content Strategy Pivot: "Closed Loop" vs. "Open Loop"

  - [**Problem:** Current content's "closed loop only" narrative is too narrow, alienating prospects not ready for full automation.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift to a broader "open loop" narrative, framing automation as an evolution through stages: `define → explore → augment → automate`.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [Avoids alienating prospects who aren't ready for full automation.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Aligns content with a future product launch that will formally introduce open loop capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [**Clarification:** "Closed loop" remains a core capability, but it is no longer the *only* story.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Content Refresh & Campaign Support

  - [**Priority:** Refresh 2–3 "closed loop" articles per vertical (Refining, Petrochem, LNG) to support new campaigns launching in \~2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [**Process:** GrowthX will replace some weekly articles with these refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [**New Messaging:** Tara will provide high-level messaging to guide the refresh, balancing the new narrative with the future product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [**Banners:** Tara will provide banners for new guides, and GrowthX will embed them in the refreshed articles.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [**CMS Migration:** Imubit is migrating from WordPress to Webflow, which will improve site performance and readability.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tara:**](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
      - [Follow up with Imubit IT (Colton) on the new Slack channel invite.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Provide high-level messaging for the content refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [Send banners for new guides to Matt.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
      - [Identify 2–3 "closed loop" articles in the Refining vertical for immediate refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
      - [Add these refreshes to the weekly content cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
      - [Embed banners in the refreshed articles upon receipt.](https://fathom.video/share/hgyiRjRWzHeqWeozEE3dsQSS9oFp8vH7?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
